title: Rey Pratt
extract: Rey Lucero Pratt was an American religious leader. He served as a general authority and as a mission president of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. He served for six years as a general authority and for 23 years as president of the church's Mexican Mission. Pratt helped establish the church in Mexico and among Spanish-speaking populations in the United States and Argentina. He also translated LDS Church materials into Spanish, wrote magazine articles, and spoke several times in the church's general conference.
